message:
feat(frankenterm-core): add CursorNextLine/PrevLine/Row handling, parser bench setup, and mermaid flowchart direction

Differential terminal harness:
- Handle Action::CursorNextLine (CNL): move down N + reset column to 0
- Handle Action::CursorPrevLine (CPL): move up N + reset column to 0
- Handle Action::CursorRow (VPA): move cursor to absolute row

Benchmark infrastructure:
- Add criterion 0.8.2 dev-dependency with html_reports
- Declare parser_patch_bench benchmark target

Mermaid showcase:
- Add flowchart direction "TB" to init directive demo theme config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
